title: Mixing and Blending Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders
description: Set up, operate, or tend machines to mix or blend materials, such as chemicals, tobacco, liquids, color pigments, or explosive ingredients.

tasks.text: Weigh or measure materials, ingredients, or products to ensure conformance to requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read work orders to determine production specifications or information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe production or monitor equipment to ensure safe and efficient operation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Mix or blend ingredients by starting machines and mixing for specified times.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stop mixing or blending machines when specified product qualities are obtained and open valves and start pumps to transfer mixtures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compound or process ingredients or dyes, according to formulas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine materials, ingredients, or products visually or with hands to ensure conformance to established standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate or tend machines to mix or blend any of a wide variety of materials, such as spices, dough batter, tobacco, fruit juices, chemicals, livestock feed, food products, color pigments, or explosive ingredients.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dump or pour specified amounts of materials into machinery or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record operational or production data on specified forms.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Collect samples of materials or products for laboratory testing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Unload mixtures into containers or onto conveyors for further processing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean work areas.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Add or mix chemicals or ingredients for processing, using hand tools or other devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tend accessory equipment, such as pumps or conveyors, to move materials or ingredients through production processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transfer materials, supplies, or products between work areas, using moving equipment or hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and maintain equipment, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dislodge and clear jammed materials or other items from machinery or equipment, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test samples of materials or products to ensure compliance with specifications, using test equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Open valves to drain slurry from mixers into storage tanks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
